rationale: Post-feature bug hunt on cycle 5 files (mobile responsive + day/night). Static analysis of 10 modified files found 3 bugs: season mapping inconsistency between Calendar and MerlinVisual, unsafe dict dot notation in Calendar (same pattern as BUG-012), and variable shadowing in HubAntre panels. All fixed.
next_cycle_plan: Feature work: core loop playtest (TEST-PLAYTEST-1) or bible audit (TEST-AUDIT-1), or new gameplay/visual feature.
